name: Mint Iced Brownies
recipeInstructions:
BROWNIE LAYER: Cream the butter with sugar. Add eggs one at a time and mix until creamy. Stir in vanilla and nuts. Gradually stir in flour, being careful not to overmix. Melt chocolate for 2-3 minutes in a small glass measuring cup, stirring after 1 1/2 minutes. Stir chocolate into batter evenly. Pour batter into greased 8-inch square casserole. Spread evenly. Bake on high for 7-8 minutes, rotating after 3 minutes. Allow to cool.
MINT LAYER: Cream butter and sugar until creamy. Add evaporated milk and peppermint flavoring, adding green coloring as desired. Carefully spread over cooled brownies. Allow mint layer to firm up before adding chocolate layer.
CHOCOLATE LAYER: Melt chocolate for 2-3 minutes in a glass measuring cup, stirring after 1 minute. Allow to cool slightly before spreading evenly over the firm mint layer. Spread carefully so that the mint and brownie layers are not disturbed. Allow to stand several hours before cutting into squares to serve.
